MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT JEFFREY LAU'S DEPOSITION, REQUEST FOR AN AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100040070) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAROLI, MICHAEL J AHERN, BRIAN TOCCOLI, MICHAEL BOMMARITO, KEVEN CARRUESCO, MATTHEW D.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS MICHAEL PAROLI, BRIAN AHERN, MICHAEL TOCCOLI, KEVEN BOMMARITO AND MATTHEW CARRUESCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT JEFFREY LAU'S DEPOSITION, REQUEST FOR AN AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT JEFFREY LAU SHALL COMMENCE WITHIN TEN DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE DEPOSITION SHALL CONTINUE DAY TO DAY UNTIL COMPLETED. THE DEPONENT SHALL BE ALLOWED REASONABLE REST BREAKS. THE DEPOSITION SHALL BE COMPLETED WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PREVAILING/MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 VIA EMAIL TO PCATALANOTTI@FMGLAW.COM JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT SOPHIE LAU, LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP, JEFFREY LAU Notice Of Motion And Motion To Bifurcate Trial is DENIED without prejudice to make the bifurcation/preclusion request before the trial judge.
Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Recorded. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Jeffrey Lau'S Deposition, Request For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs MICHAEL PAROLI, BRIAN AHERN, MICHAEL TOCCOLI, KEVEN BOMMARITO and MATTHEW CARRUESCO's Motion To Compel Defendant Jeffrey Lau'S Deposition, Request For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions.

The Motion is GRANTED. The deposition of Defendant Jeffrey Lau shall commence within ten days of notice of this order. The deposition shall continue day to day until completed. The deponent shall be allowed reasonable rest breaks. The deposition shall be completed within twenty days of notice of this order. The request for sanctions is denied.

Prevailing/Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to pcatalanotti@fmglaw.com

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
